opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: No booking button on site, no CRM tools, phone-only contact detected.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers searching after hours are booking competitors with online scheduling.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered booking widget capturing leads 24/7 without requiring a phone call.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 4.4 rating across 139 reviews with no detected owner response patterns.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal neglect to prospective Boise customers comparing local HVAC options.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized review responses using AI trained on HVAC service context.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no recurring revenue signals on site.
opportunities.observation: Boise's harsh winters and summers make seasonal tune-ups a high-value recurring revenue stream.
opportunities.fix: Automate pre-season maintenance reminders via SMS and email to past customers each spring and fall.
